properties.remark: PEA SIZE HAIL...PUBLIC REPORT RELAYED BY MEDIA.
REPORT VIA SOCIAL MEDIA.
BRIEF HEAVY RAIN AHEAD OF HAIL, AND THEN AGAIN AFTER THE HAIL.
NUMEROUS REPORTS OF HAIL RANGING FROM QUARTER TO GOLF BALL.
HAIL COVERING THE GROUND, MAKING IT WHITE. MOST STONES WERE SMALLER, BUT SOME UP TO THE SIZE OF QUARTERS.
IN ADDITION, THERE WAS A PUBLIC REPORT OF GOLF BALL SIZED HAIL AND A BROKEN WINDSHIELD ON HIS VEHICLE.
NUMEROUS REPORTS OF LARGE HAIL BETWEEN WESTFIELD AND SOUTHEAST OF HINTON IN PAST HALF HOUR. LOTS OF BROKEN WINDOWS IN HOUSES AND CARS. LARGEST HAIL WAS IN HINTON, WITH HALF DOLLAR SIZE HAIL OBSERVED.
LAW ENFORCEMENT AND SOCIAL MEDIA PHOTOS CONFIRMED HEN EGG TO BASEBALL SIZED HAIL JUST SOUTH OF HINTON.
